notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the java-17-openjdk SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 9.2. It addresses 6 CVEs: CVE-2024-20918, CVE-2024-20919, CVE-2024-20921, CVE-2024-20926, CVE-2024-20945, and 1 more.
notes.title: Description

references.summary: Canonical URL for this CSAF document
